name: Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I
business: Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on July 2, 2024, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The Company has not commenced any operations nor generated any revenues to date. All activity from inception through December 31, 2025 relates to formation, the initial public offering, and the search for an initial business combination.

exposures.sentence: While we may enter into an initial business combination opportunity with a target business in any industry, there are three primary areas of focus we will concentrate our efforts in: 1. Cryptocurrency and Blockchain . 2. Data Security .

While we may enter into an initial business combination opportunity with a target business in any industry, there are three primary areas of focus we will concentrate our efforts in: 1. Cryptocurrency and Blockchain . 2. Data Security .

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until 24 months from the closing of the initial public offering to consummate an initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: The global blockchain technology market size was estimated at USD 31.28 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 90.1% from 2025 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Over the next decade, an estimated $3 trillion USD is expected to be spent on data security and systems hardening.
